title: feat: wire retry policy into session manager
body:
## Overview

Consume the retry policy defined upstream.

## Expected Behavior

Sessions apply retry policy from maestro.toml.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Sessions honor retry limit
- [ ] Sessions honor backoff config

## Files to Modify

- src/session/manager.rs

## Test Hints

Reuse the fake CLI trait from #42.

## Blocked By

- #42

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Tests pass
